title.en: Playing a Board Game with Family

phrases.en: After dinner, Kate took the board game down from the shelf.
phrases.zh: 晚饭后，凯特从架子上取下了那盒桌游。

phrases.en: She lifted the lid and unfolded the game board on the table.
phrases.zh: 她打开盒盖，把游戏棋盘在桌上摊开。

phrases.en: Her family gathered around the table and pulled up their chairs.
phrases.zh: 她的家人围到桌边，把椅子拉了过来。

phrases.en: Kate sorted the colorful pieces into small piles.
phrases.zh: 凯特把五颜六色的棋子分成了几小堆。

phrases.en: She dealt the play money evenly to each player.
phrases.zh: 她把游戏纸币平均发给了每位玩家。

phrases.en: Everyone chose a token and placed it on the starting square.
phrases.zh: 每个人都挑了一个棋子，放在了起点格上。

phrases.en: Dad read the rules aloud so nobody felt confused.
phrases.zh: 爸爸大声念了规则，这样大家就不会一头雾水了。

phrases.en: The youngest player rolled the dice first.
phrases.zh: 年纪最小的玩家先掷了骰子。

phrases.en: They took turns rolling and moving around the board.
phrases.zh: 他们轮流掷骰子，沿着棋盘往前走。

phrases.en: Kate drew a card and followed the instructions on it.
phrases.zh: 凯特抽了一张卡，按照上面的指示做了。

phrases.en: Everyone laughed loudly when Dad landed on a penalty square.
phrases.zh: 当爸爸走到惩罚格上时，大家都哈哈大笑。

phrases.en: At the end, they tallied the scores carefully.
phrases.zh: 游戏结束时，他们仔细地统计了分数。

phrases.en: Kate won the game with the highest score.
phrases.zh: 凯特以最高分赢得了这局游戏。

phrases.en: Together they packed the pieces away and put the box back.
phrases.zh: 他们一起把棋子收好，把盒子放了回去。
